//: Tests get every strict flag EXCEPT noUncheckedIndexedAccess — that flag guards against out-of-bounds on real runtime data, but test fixtures are built in-place and indexing them is safe. Production code (tsconfig.json) keeps it on.
//types: Tests run under vitest in Node, so test-only files may use node: builtins (e.g. fs/path in the styling-class contract guard). Production (tsconfig.json) stays chrome-only.
